  • Hide All Code
  • Download Rmd

Pseudobulk, análisis de expresión diferencial y análisis discriminante

Francisco Manuel González Nuño

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(scater)
library(scuttle)
library(edgeR)
library(mixOmics)
library(gt)
library(viridis)

conflicted::conflict_prefer("select", "dplyr")
conflicted::conflict_prefer("filter", "dplyr")
conflicted::conflict_prefer("rename", "dplyr")

source("Functions/contraste.R")
sce_raw <- readRDS("../Datos/sce_raw.rds")
sce2 <- readRDS("../Datos/sce_2.rds")
# sce_raw <- sce_raw[, colnames(sce_raw) %in% colnames(sce2[,sce2$annMid %in% c("Epi", "EpiT")])]
sce_raw <- sce_raw[, colnames(sce_raw) %in% colnames(sce2[, sce2$cellAnnot == "Epithelial_cells"])]
rm(sce2)

1 Pseudo-Bulk

Nos interesa hacer agreación por paciente y tejido.

sce_raw$pb_ids <- paste(sce_raw$patient,
                    sce_raw$region_long,
                    sep = "_")


pb <- aggregateAcrossCells(
  sce_raw,
  ids = sce_raw$pb_ids,
  use.assay.type = "counts"
)
#excluimos metastasis post-tratamiento porque solo tendría una pseudo-muestra
# pb <- pb[, !(pb$region_long %in% c("Metastasis post-tratamiento"))]
pb <- pb[, !(pb$patient %in% c("CRC01", "CRC02"))]

pb$patient <- factor(pb$patient)
pb$patient <- droplevels(pb$patient)

pb$region_long <- factor(pb$region_long)
pb$region_long <- droplevels(pb$region_long)
pb$region_long <- relevel(pb$region_long, ref = "Tumor Primario")

1.1 PCA

pb <- logNormCounts(pb)
pb <- runPCA(pb)
plotPCA(pb,
        shape_by = "region_long",
        colour_by = "patient") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "PCA de pseudo-bulk",
       x = "PC1",
       y = "PC2") +
  guides(shape = guide_legend(title = "Región"),
         colour = guide_legend(title = "Paciente"))

table(pb$patient, pb$region_long)
##        
##         Tumor Primario Colon Normal Metastasis Nodo Linfático
##   CRC03              1            1                         0
##   CRC04              1            1                         1
##   CRC06              1            0                         1
##   CRC09              1            1                         0
##   CRC10              1            0                         1
##   CRC11              1            0                         1
saveRDS(pb, "../Datos/pb.rds")

2 Análisis de expresión diferencial

targets <- base::setdiff(
  levels(pb$region_long),
  "Tumor Primario"
)

all_results <- list()

for (target in targets) {
  
  cat("\nAnalizando contraste: ", target, " vs Tumor Primario\n")
  
  tab <- contraste_pb(
    pb = pb,
    target = target,
    ref = "Tumor Primario",
    lfc = log2(1.5),
    robust = T
  )
  
  suffix <- make.names(target)
  
  tab <- tab %>%
    rename_with(
      .fn = ~ paste0(.x, "_", suffix),
      .cols = -gene_id
    )
  
  all_results[[target]] <- tab
}
## 
## Analizando contraste:  Colon Normal  vs Tumor Primario
## 
## Analizando contraste:  Metastasis Nodo Linfático  vs Tumor Primario
#fusionamos resultados
de_merged <- purrr::reduce(all_results,
                           full_join,
                           by = "gene_id")

#se añade gene symbol
de_merged <- de_merged %>%
  mutate(
    gene_name = rowData(pb)$gene_name[match(de_merged$gene_id,
                                                   rownames(pb))]
    ) %>%
  select(gene_id, gene_name, everything(),
         -starts_with("unshrunk"))

write.csv(de_merged, "../Results/DE_pseudobulk.csv", row.names = FALSE)

2.1 Volcano plots

for(target in targets){
  suffix <- make.names(target)
  
  tab <- de_merged %>%
    select(gene_id, gene_name, 
           paste0("logFC_", suffix),
           paste0("FDR_", suffix),
           paste0("PValue_", suffix)) %>%
    rename(logFC = paste0("logFC_", suffix),
           FDR = paste0("FDR_", suffix),
           PValue = paste0("PValue_", suffix))

  tab <- tab %>%
    mutate(
      log10FDR = -log10(FDR),
      sig = case_when(
        logFC > 1 & log10FDR > -log10(0.05) ~ "UP",
        logFC < -1 & log10FDR > -log10(0.05) ~ "DOWN",
        TRUE ~ "NS"
      ),
      tag = case_when(
        sig != "NS" ~ gene_name,
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ))
      
  p <- ggplot(tab, 
              aes(x = logFC, 
                  y = log10FDR)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = sig), 
               alpha = 0.6) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("UP" = "#E69F00", 
                                  "DOWN" = "#56B4E9", 
                                  "NS" = "grey60")) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-1, 1), 
               linetype = "dashed", 
               color = "black") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), 
               linetype = "dashed", 
               color = "black") +
    geom_text_repel(aes(label = tag),
                    size = 3,
                    max.overlaps = 10,
                    show.legend = FALSE) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = paste("Volcano plot:", 
                       target, "vs Tumor Primario"),
         x = "Log2 Fold Change",
         y = "-Log10 FDR") +
    theme(legend.title = element_blank())
  
  print(p)
    
  }

3 Análisis discriminante supervisado: sPLS-DA

source("Functions/extract_selectVar.R")
hvg_genes <- readRDS("../Datos/hvg_genes.rds")

3.1 Constraste tumor primario vs metástasis granglionar

3.1.1 Filtramos pacientes y genes

pb_spls <- pb[, pb$region_long != "Colon Normal"]

pb_spls$region_long <- droplevels(factor(pb_spls$region_long))
pb_spls$patient <- droplevels(factor(pb_spls$patient))


pb_spls <- pb_spls[rowData(pb_spls)$gene_id %in% hvg_genes, ]
rownames(pb_spls) <- rowData(pb_spls)$gene_name

3.1.2 Ajuste del modelo sPLS-DA

splsda_res <- splsda(
  X = t(logcounts(pb_spls)),
  Y = pb_spls$region_long,
  ncomp = 2,
  keepX = c(50,50),
  near.zero.var = TRUE
)
## Warning in Check.entry.pls(X, Y, ncomp, keepX, keepY, mode = mode, scale = scale, : Zero- or near-zero variance predictors.
##  Reset
##             predictors matrix to not near-zero variance predictors.
## 
##             See $nzv for problematic predictors.

3.1.3 Representación de las muestras

scores <- as.data.frame(splsda_res$variates$X)

# Asegurar nombres simples para las componentes
colnames(scores) <- paste0("comp", seq_len(ncol(scores)))

splsda_df <- bind_cols(scores, as.data.frame(colData(pb_spls)))
ggplot(
  splsda_df,
  aes(
    x = comp1,
    y = comp2,
    color = region_long,
    shape = patient
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 3, 
             alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_text_repel(
    aes(label = patient),
    size = 3,
    max.overlaps = 20,
    seed = 1234
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "sPLS-DA pseudobulk",
    x = "sPLS-DA componente 1",
    y = "sPLS-DA componente 2",
    color = "Región",
    shape = "Paciente"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

3.1.4 Genes seleccionados por componente

Extraemos los genes

selected_genes <- purrr::map_dfr(
  # seq_len(2),
  1,
  ~extract_selectVar(splsda_res, .x)
)
saveRDS(selected_genes, "../Results/splsda_selected_genes_TPMNL.rds")

selected_genes %>%
  select(gene, 
         loading) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Genes seleccionados por sPLS-DA: primera componente") %>%
  cols_label(
    gene = "Gen",
    loading = "Loading"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = loading,
    decimals = 3
  ) %>%
  tab_options(table.font.size = "small")

3.1.5 Genes con mayor contribución al modelo

selected_genes %>%
  group_by(component) %>%
  slice_max(loading, n = 50, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = reorder(gene, abs(loading)),
      y = loading,
      fill = loading
    )
  ) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~ component, 
             scales = "free_y", 
             labeller = as_labeller(c(
               comp1 = "Componente 1",
               comp2 = "Componente 2"
             ))) +
  labs(
    title = "Genes con mayor contribución al modelo sPLS-DA",
    x = "Gen",
    y = "Loading"
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10))

3.2 Constraste tumor primario vs colon normal

3.2.1 Filtramos pacientes y genes

pb_spls <- pb[, pb$region_long != "Metastasis Nodo Linfático"]

pb_spls$region_long <- droplevels(factor(pb_spls$region_long))
pb_spls$patient <- droplevels(factor(pb_spls$patient))


pb_spls <- pb_spls[rowData(pb_spls)$gene_id %in% hvg_genes, ]
rownames(pb_spls) <- rowData(pb_spls)$gene_name

3.2.2 Ajuste del modelo sPLS-DA

splsda_res <- splsda(
  X = t(logcounts(pb_spls)),
  Y = pb_spls$region_long,
  ncomp = 2,
  keepX = c(50,50),
  near.zero.var = TRUE
)
## Warning in Check.entry.pls(X, Y, ncomp, keepX, keepY, mode = mode, scale = scale, : Zero- or near-zero variance predictors.
##  Reset
##             predictors matrix to not near-zero variance predictors.
## 
##             See $nzv for problematic predictors.

3.2.3 Representación de las muestras

scores <- as.data.frame(splsda_res$variates$X)

# Asegurar nombres simples para las componentes
colnames(scores) <- paste0("comp", seq_len(ncol(scores)))

splsda_df <- bind_cols(scores, as.data.frame(colData(pb_spls)))
ggplot(
  splsda_df,
  aes(
    x = comp1,
    y = comp2,
    color = region_long,
    shape = patient
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 3, 
             alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_text_repel(
    aes(label = patient),
    size = 3,
    max.overlaps = 20,
    seed = 1234
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "sPLS-DA pseudobulk",
    x = "sPLS-DA componente 1",
    y = "sPLS-DA componente 2",
    color = "Región",
    shape = "Paciente"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

3.2.4 Genes seleccionados por componente

Extraemos los genes

selected_genes <- purrr::map_dfr(
  # seq_len(2),
  1,
  ~extract_selectVar(splsda_res, .x)
)
saveRDS(selected_genes, "../Results/splsda_selected_genes_TPCN.rds")

selected_genes %>%
  select(gene, 
         loading) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Genes seleccionados por sPLS-DA: primera componente") %>%
  cols_label(
    gene = "Gen",
    loading = "Loading"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = loading,
    decimals = 3
  ) %>%
  tab_options(table.font.size = "small")

3.2.5 Genes con mayor contribución al modelo

selected_genes %>%
  group_by(component) %>%
  slice_max(loading, n = 50, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = reorder(gene, abs(loading)),
      y = loading,
      fill = loading
    )
  ) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~ component, 
             scales = "free_y", 
             labeller = as_labeller(c(
               comp1 = "Componente 1",
               comp2 = "Componente 2"
             ))) +
  labs(
    title = "Genes con mayor contribución al modelo sPLS-DA",
    x = "Gen",
    y = "Loading"
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10))
